SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_N.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by Nissan

TemperatureLVPath1.comment: Measured PCB temperature of path 1 on LV side

TemperatureLVPath2.comment: Measured PCB temperature of path 2 on LV side

Vdd13ProtSupplyVoltage.comment: Auxialiary power supply voltage for gate drivers

DesiredOpModePath1.comment: Internal desired operating mode for Dcdc converter path 1

DesiredOpModePath2.comment: Internal desired operating mode for Dcdc converter path 2

DetailedOpModePath1.comment: Internal detailed operation mode of first converter path

DetailedOpModePath2.comment: Internal detailed operation mode of second converter path

PrimaryTransfoCurrentPath1.comment: Primary transformer current of path 1 (HV side)

PrimaryTransfoCurrentPath2.comment: Primary transformer current of path 2 (HV side)

GlobalEnableStatePath1.comment: HW enable status of converter path 1

GlobalEnableStatePath2.comment: HW enable status of converter path 2

FOTA_reset_cancel_counter.comment: To reset the FOTA cancel counter

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

lists.6835: LV Rectifier Voltage Sensor Phase 1 Failure
lists.6836: LV Rectifier Voltage Sensor Phase 2 Failure
lists.6839: Read Error In Non Volatile Memory
lists.6840: Write Error In Non Volatile Memory
lists.6848: Reverse Current HW Latch Reset Is Invalid
lists.6850: LV Overvoltage Detected On Boardnet Side
lists.6822: Input Supply Voltage Sensor/ECU Switch Off Failure

DTCOccurenceCounter.comment: Number of occurence failure which has been detected

DCDC_Input_Current.comment: DCDC internal measurement of input HV current

DCDC_Output_Voltage_2.comment: DCDC output voltage measured by sensor 2 (redundant)

DCDC_Output_Voltage.comment: DCDC output voltage measured by sensor 1

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDC_ElecSysFailure.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDC_ElecSysFailureDisplay transmitted from DCDC

lists.1: Fault type 1 DCDC Stopped CLASS C
lists.2: Fault type 2 DCDC Stopped CLASS D
lists.4: Fault type 4 DCDC Safety Barrier lost

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDC_Fault_Type.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDC_Fault_Type transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDC_ElecMotorFailu.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDC_ElecMotorFailureDisplay transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_MaxCurrentAvailable.comment: Copy of CAN signal MaxCurrentAvailableBySystem transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDCTemp.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCTemp transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDC_RefusetoSleep.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDC_RefusetoSleep transmitted from DCDC

CurrentLVPath1.comment: Measured current of path 1 on LV side

CurrentLVPath2.comment: Measured current of path 2 on LV side

DCDC_CAN_Received_DistanceTotalizer.comment: Copy of CAN signal DistanceTotalizer received from HEVC

lists.0: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

DCDC_CAN_Received_GADE_HV_v2.comment: Copy of CAN signal GADE_HV_v2 received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_DCDCVoltageRegulation_.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCVoltageRegulation_v2 received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_WakeUpSleepCommand.comment: Copy of CAN signal WakeUpSleepCommand received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDCInputPower.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCInputPower transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDCCurrentOutput.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCCurrentOutput transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Received_VehicleSpeed.comment: Copy of CAN signal VehicleSpeed received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_VehicleStates.comment: Copy of CAN signal VehicleStates_HV received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_HVFOTAConditionCheckSt.comment: Copy of CAN signal HVFOTAConditionCheckStatus_HV received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDCInterlockState.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCInterlockState transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Transmitted_DCDCState.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCState transmitted from DCDC

DCDC_CAN_Received_BatteryVoltage.comment: Copy of CAN signal BatteryVoltage received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_DCDCActivation.comment: Copy of CAN signal DCDCActivation received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_BMS_InterlockServicePl.comment: Copy of CAN signal BMS_InterlockServicePlug received from HEVC

DCDC_CAN_Received_AbsoluteTimeSince1rstI.comment: Copy of CAN signal AbsoluteTimeSince1rstIgn received from HEVC

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

InputVoltage_Calculated_from_OutputVolta.comment: HV voltage calculated from LV voltage

Supply_voltage_Kl30.comment: Internal supply voltage derived from B+ terminal

MeasuredHVCurrentInput.comment: Measured HV current by Total Current Sensor

Coolant_temperature_calculated_dcdc.comment: coolant temperature estimated from hottest converter path

Coolant_temperature_calculated_2_dcdc.comment: coolant temperature estimated from the other converter path

HVOverCurrentThreshold.comment: HV overcurrent detection threshold for TCS

InputVoltage_Monitoring_SW.comment: HV voltage measured by Level-2 software (monitoring)

InputVoltageQuality_Monitoring_SW.comment: Quality of HV voltage measured by Level-2 software (monitoring)

ErrorSafeStateReqHardware.comment: HW circuit causing safe-state of DCDC (bit-coded)

ErrorSafeStateReqSoftware.comment: SW function causing safe-state of DCDC (bit-coded)

HVRangeCheckErrorCounter_Monitoring_SW.comment: Range check error counter for HV input voltage in L2-software (monitoring)

LvShortCircuitCount_path_A.comment: number of detected short circuits on LV side of path A

LvShortCircuitCount_path_B.comment: number of detected short circuits on LV side of path B

OutputCurrentCalculated_path_A.comment: output current calculated from primary transformer current of path A

OutputCurrentCalculated_path_B.comment: output current calculated from primary transformer current of path B

OutputVoltage_Monitoring_SW.comment: voltage measured from ULV1 by Level-2 software (monitoring)

OutputVoltageRedundant_Monitoring_SW.comment: voltage measured from ULV2 by Level-2 software (monitoring)

ErrrorCounterWatchdogQueryExternal.comment: error counter of microcontroller with external watchdog (query-response error)

ErrorCounterWatchdogSPIExternal.comment: error counter of microcontroller with external watchdog (spi error)

CoreIdMPUTrap.comment: Microcontroller ID that caused the MPU trap

MemAccessMPUTrap.comment: Address of memory whose access caused MPU trap

MasterIdMPUTrap.comment: ID of bus-master which caused MPU trap

ProgAddressMPUTrap.comment: Program Adress which caused MPU trap

SwitchoverStatus.comment: This DID will be used by Bosch to check the current switchover status

SwitchoverGetSeed_WriteKey.comment: This DID will be used by Bosch to get the seed from DCDC and write the key back to DCDC while perfor

SwitchoverRemoveSwitchover.comment: This DID will be used by Bosch to remove the "switchover"

ResetInfo_Read_Clear.comment: RDBI service reads the Reset ID and total number of occurrences / WDBI service clears the reset info

ResetHistory.comment: List of last 8 resets along with mileage information

FOTAStateOfDCDC.comment: This DID returns the current state of FOTA state-machine in DCDC

FOTAResumeAddress.comment: This DID returns the address from which data transfer has to be resumed during "Installation" phase

FOTAFlashMemoryBankNumber.comment: This DID returns the memory bank number (current) used for FOTA update.

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by Renault
